thread.title: Election Results 2024 Live Updates: NDA Crosses 100 Seat Mark In Maharashtra, Also Ahead In Jharkhand
thread.title_full: Election Results 2024 Live Updates: NDA Crosses 100 Seat Mark In Maharashtra, Also Ahead In Jharkhand

author: Heena Ojha
title: Election Results 2024 Live Updates: NDA Crosses 100 Seat Mark In Maharashtra, Also Ahead In Jharkhand
text:
Election Results 2024 Live Updates: Results for both, the Maharashtra Assembly Election and the Jharkhand Assemble Election, will be declared on Nov. 23.
Heena Ojha
23 Nov 2024, 09:34 AM IST 23 Nov 2024, 07:02 AM IST 23 Nov 2024, 09:34 AM IST WhatsApp X (was Twitter) Facebook Telegram Save
Election results in Maharashtra and Jharkhand will be declared on Nov. 23 (Photo source: PTI ) LIVE FEED Latest First Oldest First 09:34 AM Maharashtra Election Result Live: Devendra Fadnavis Ahead Devendra Fadnavis is leading in the Nagpur South West seat in Maharashtra assembly election 2024 by 4,713 votes as per official data by Election Commission as of 09:33 a.m.
ADVERTISEMENT
09:20 AM Maharashtra Election Live: Ajit Pawar Ahead The high-stakes contest in Baramati, Maharashtra, sees NCP's Ajit Pawar leading over his nephew, Yugendra Pawar, who is backed by the Sharadchandra Pawar faction of the NCP.
09:08 AM Maharashtra Election Result Live: NDA Cross 100 Seat Mark The ruling Mahayuti alliance surged ahead in early trends, by 9:08 a.m., the alliance, led by the Bharatiya Janata Party along with the Shiv Sena and Nationalist Congress Party factions headed by Eknath Shinde and Ajit Pawar, was leading in 111 seats. The opposition Maha Vikas Aghadi, consisting of the Congress and the Sena and NCP factions led by Uddhav Thackeray and Sharad Pawar, started off slowly but gained momentum, securing leads in 77 seats.
ADVERTISEMENT
09:01 AM Jharkhand Election Result 2024: WATCH Fresh visuals emerge from Pandra Bazar Samiti counting centre in Ranchi, Jharkhand
VIDEO | Jharkhand Election Results 2024: Visuals from Pandra Bazar Samiti counting centre in Ranchi. #JharkhandAssemblyElection2024 #ElectionResults2024WithPTI pic.twitter.com/KxcaHQN3Xd
— Press Trust of India (@PTI_News) November 23, 2024
08:58 AM Maharashtra Election Result Live: Mahayuti Alliance Ahead With 92 Seats The ruling Mahayuti alliance has taken a strong early lead as vote counting began on Saturday morning for the Maharashtra Assembly election. By 8:57 a.m., the Mahayuti, led by the Bharatiya Janata Party along with the Shiv Sena and Nationalist Congress Party factions led by Eknath Shinde and Ajit Pawar, was ahead in 92 seats. In contrast, the opposition Maha Vikas Aghadi, comprising the Congress and the Sena and NCP factions led by Uddhav Thackeray and Sharad Pawar, was leading in just 57 seats.
ADVERTISEMENT
